title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 95.455 - Bonds to be registered
text:
95.455.  Bonds to be registered. — All bonds issued under the provisions of sections 95.415 to 95.460 shall be presented to and registered by the state auditor before being offered for sale, and it shall be the duty of the state auditor to register such bonds, upon satisfactory proof, that all the provisions of said sections authorizing the issue of bonds have been complied with.
(RSMo 1939 § 7465) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7312; 1919 § 8727; 1909 § 9606
